column16: This includes the number of notices received through X’s notice and action mechanism pursuant to DSA Article 16. Each notice is counted once regardless of the number of items it refers to. Categories reflect the reporter's selected reason and subcategory at time of submission. Cross-category reclassification has been applied where a more specific category applies.
column17: Notices received from Trusted Flaggers awarded status under DSA Article 22.
column18: Number of specific items of information included in the total number of notices, reflecting the number of 'exact electronic locations' (i.e., content URLs) pointed out by the notifier pursuant to Article 16(2)(b).
column19: Number of specific items of information included in notices submitted by Trusted Flaggers.
column20: Median time to take action on notices calculated as the median time in hours between receipt of the notice and implementation of an action (case closure). Cases where no action was taken are excluded from the median calculation.
column21: Median time to take action on Trusted Flagger notices calculated as the median time in hours between receipt of the notice and implementation of an action (case closure). Cases where no action was taken are excluded from the median calculation.
column22: Actions taken on the basis of the law, where content visibility is restricted in a specific EU Member State pursuant to applicable national law.
column23: Actions taken on Trusted Flagger notices on the basis of the law, where content visibility is restricted in a specific EU Member State pursuant to applicable national law.
column24: Actions taken on Trusted Flagger notices on the basis of the law, where content visibility is restricted in a specific EU Member State pursuant to applicable national law.
column25: Actions taken on Trusted Flagger notices on the basis of X's Terms of Service.
